Definition: Malignant and benign neoplasms, including solid tumors and hematological malignancies
Examples: Lung adenocarcinoma, Colorectal cancer, Melanoma, Glioblastoma multiforme, Ovarian cancer

Definition: Inherited disorders and developmental abnormalities present from birth
Examples: Cystic fibrosis, Duchenne muscular dystrophy, Down syndrome, Huntington's disease, Marfan syndrome

Definition: Neurological disorders affecting the central and peripheral nervous system
Examples: Alzheimer's disease, Multiple sclerosis, Epilepsy syndrome, Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, Parkinson's disease

Definition: Autoimmune conditions and immune-mediated inflammatory diseases
Examples: Rheumatoid arthritis, Psoriasis, Sjögren's syndrome, Ankylosing spondylitis, Psoriatic arthritis

Definition: Disorders of the digestive system including inflammatory bowel conditions
Examples: Ulcerative colitis, Crohn's disease, Barrett's esophagus, NASH, Gastroesophageal reflux disease

Definition: Diseases affecting bone, muscle, cartilage, and connective tissue
Examples: Osteoarthritis, Systemic lupus erythematosus, Scleroderma, Osteoporosis, Arthritis

Definition: Heart and vascular diseases including cardiomyopathies and vascular disorders
Examples: Myocardial infarction, Hypertension, Atherosclerosis, Dilated cardiomyopathy, Pulmonary hypertension

Definition: Bacterial, viral, fungal, and parasitic infections
Examples: Tuberculosis, Influenza, Hepatitis C, HIV infectious disease, Dengue disease

Definition: Lung and airway diseases including asthma and pulmonary fibrosis
Examples: Asthma, Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease, Allergic asthma, Acute lung injury, Bronchopulmonary dysplasia

Definition: Blood disorders including anemias and coagulation abnormalities
Examples: Sickle cell anemia, Aplastic anemia, Myelodysplastic syndrome, Chronic myeloid leukemia, Acute T cell leukemia

Definition: Mental health disorders including mood, anxiety, and psychotic conditions
Examples: Schizophrenia, Autism spectrum disorder, Alcohol abuse, Nicotine dependence, Bipolar disorder

Definition: Diseases of the reproductive system and breast tissue
Examples: Breast cancer, Endometriosis, Prostate cancer, Endometrial cancer, Polycystic ovary syndrome

Definition: Hormonal disorders affecting endocrine glands and metabolism
Examples: Polycystic ovary syndrome, Papillary thyroid carcinoma, Adrenoleukodystrophy, Androgen insensitivity syndrome

Definition: General phenotypic conditions and syndrome complexes
Examples: Ischemic stroke, Septic shock, Hypoxia, Dystonia, Intellectual disability

Definition: Kidney and urinary tract disorders including nephropathies
Examples: Renal cell carcinoma, Cystitis, Nephroblastoma, Interstitial cystitis, Diabetic nephropathy

Definition: Dermatological conditions affecting skin, hair, and nails
Examples: Atopic dermatitis, Eczema, Psoriasis vulgaris, Actinic keratosis, Urticaria

Definition: Metabolic disorders including lipid and glucose metabolism abnormalities
Examples: Diabetes mellitus, Obesity, Morbid obesity, MELAS syndrome, Familial hypercholesterolemia

Definition: Pancreatic diseases including pancreatitis and exocrine disorders
Examples: Type 1 diabetes mellitus, Type 2 diabetes mellitus, Pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma

Definition: Eye disorders including retinopathies and ocular inflammatory conditions
Examples: Glaucoma, Primary open angle glaucoma

Definition: Pregnancy-related conditions and perinatal complications
Examples: Pre-eclampsia
